name: Makkapitew Brown | the delinquent tyrannosaurus In love with you
description:
Popular user x delinquent char

Silver Valley University series

2/?

Tyrannosaurus rex

Makkapitew Brown, more know as Maccky, the local delinquent of Silver Valley University, anyone on the college fears her, even when they don't show it, and it's pretty obvious she also hates everyone in there, except for one person

You

Will you accept her love?

Or will you let the poor girl down?

Or maybe, others have more your interest

Extra image

Others from this series

-Majungasaurs: https://janitorai.com/characters/9db733e3-1e81-479a-a5d0-e97a840c20e4_character-junka-your-tsundere-majungasaurus-bully

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This character has been made for the lovely Miaultima, who requested an tsundere tyrannosaurus in the last bot

Initial greeting on the first public chat

As always all images were made by Pixai

I would also like to thanks all the lovely members of Janitor's discord server, but specially: @gremgremi @witchgay @dumbass92 and much other incredible people for various ideas

@fleshgel for the help with Blackfoot language

And finally but not less important: @sunglassesdog for the help with the placement of the university: Vermont

The personality section was based on the amazing guide by absolutetrash
creator: Gurter
